title: Verify the eligible classification projection
preconditions: A public LEDGER contract supplies compatible and incompatible projection versions, multi-page eligible data, excluded lifecycle and relationship examples, and expiring snapshots.
steps: Discover the projection schema; request and page a complete snapshot; exercise every included and excluded state; repeat unchanged acquisition; force version mismatch and cursor expiry.
expected: FR-CLASSIFY-ELIGIBLE-PROJECTION holds: schema and membership are explicit, every ordinal appears once in stable order, excluded finance states remain excluded, and incompatible or incomplete acquisition yields no partial evaluation.
